headline: Wolfe Research bullish on SLB and BKR, sees selective oil services cycle ahead
summary: Investing.com -- Wolfe Research initiated coverage of three major oilfield services companies on Wednesday, assigning Outperform ratings to SLB and Baker Hughes while rating Halliburton at Peer Perform, as analyst Carlos Escalante said the industry faces "a selective capital cycle favoring international exposure."

headline: Halliburton Lands Key Iraq Oilfield Deal to Boost Production
summary: HAL expands in Iraq with an integrated contract to develop the Bin Umar and Sindbad oil fields, targeting higher oil and gas output through advanced operations.

headline: Software and cloud computing names have strong growth scenarios, says ETF Action's Mike Akins
summary: Mike Akins, ETF Action founding partner, joins 'Halftime Report' to discuss the under-appreciated market trades, catch up trades for the rest of the year and much more.

headline: UBS Lifts Price Target on Halliburton (HAL), Reaffirms Neutral Rating
summary: With an average upside potential of 36.72% according to Wall Street analysts, Halliburton Company (NYSE:HAL) is included among the 10 Most Promising Energy Stocks to Buy Now. Halliburton Company (NYSE:HAL) is one of the largest providers of products and services to the energy industry in the world. On July 2, UBS slightly upped its price estimate […]

headline: Susquehanna Maintains Positive on Halliburton, Lowers Price Target to $42
summary: Susquehanna  analyst Charles Minervino   maintains Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) with a Positive and lowers the price target from $45 to $42.
